version.description: Schema version. The linter rejects unknown versions.

source.description: Path to the source file, relative to the repository root.

sourceSpan.description: Closed interval of 1-indexed line numbers [start, end]. start must be <= end.

sourceHash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the source lines in the span, prefixed with 'sha256:'.

item.description: Display name of the item (function, struct, macro, etc.). Not a unique key — identity is item + source_span.

reviewed.description: Optional. Whether a human has reviewed and accepted this intent via sidecar approval. Defaults to false when absent. The linter also considers an item reviewed if @liyi:intent is present in source.

intent.description: Natural-language description of what the item SHOULD do, or the sentinel value '=doc' meaning the source docstring captures intent.

source_hash.description: Tool-managed. SHA-256 hex digest of the source lines in the span. Computed by liyi reanchor or the linter — agents should not produce this.

source_anchor.description: Literal text of the first line of the span. Tool-managed — agents should not produce this.

confidence.description: Optional. Agent's self-assessed confidence in the inferred intent. May be removed after review.

related.description: Optional. Maps requirement names to their source_hash at time of last review. Agents write null; the tool fills in hashes.

requirement.description: Name of the requirement. Unique per repository.

source_hash.description: Tool-managed. Computed by liyi reanchor or the linter.

source_anchor.description: Literal text of the first line of the span. Tool-managed.
